_provenance: Schema-derived fixture. Shape mirrors ai_advisor.ConfigSuggestion Pydantic model (ai_advisor.py). Values for 'suggested_value' and 'current_value' are representative of the TRIGGER_THRESHOLD_PCT valid range documented in _PARAM_VALID_RANGES in ai_advisor.py — not producer-computed outputs. Purpose: feed into enforce_suggestion_allowlist and the locked-var filter under test.
description: A Claude response containing a suggestion for TRIGGER_THRESHOLD_PCT (a locked var). This MUST be rejected by the adoption filter.

suggestions_with_locked_var.suggested_value_description: a value within the valid range for this param — exact float irrelevant, key presence is what matters
suggestions_with_locked_var.rationale: MC triggered more often at lower threshold; tightens guard arm.

suggestions_without_locked_var.rationale: Take-profit fires earlier under high volatility regime.

_why_no_hardcoded_producer_values: Test assertions check for KEY PRESENCE or KEY ABSENCE, never numeric equality on producer-computed floats. The 'example' values are illustrative only and are not asserted against.
